insight_events.title: Rare negative YoY quarter(s)
insight_events.summary: Rare negative YoY quarter(s): YoY growth moved to -66.9% to -58.0% YoY (baseline median +47.6% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.
